info.title: Venpa Online API
info.description: API for online buy side and delivery sync.

get.description: Check if the API is running and healthy

parameters.name: prod_code
parameters.description: Return only subcategories linked to this product code via product_sub_categories

get.summary: Get subcategories by category code, or get one subcategory by id/code

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Preferred: category code to load linked subcategories. Fallback: numeric subcategory id or scat_code.

get.summary: Get publisher by id or pub_code
Get all books linked to a publisher id or pub_code
Get author by id or auth_code
Get all books linked to an author id or auth_code

post.summary: Create a new custom navigation item

get.summary: Get best selling (danata random ewa enne)
Get pick and collect locations for a product
Get best selling and new arrival products

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Shared limit for both groups (default: 10, max: 50)

post.summary: Bulk ekak widihata cart items adding

put.summary: Update cart item quantity by product code

delete.summary: Remove item from cart by product code
Remove item from wishlist by product code

put.summary: Update cart item quantity by product code

get.summary: Average rating point ekak gannawa product ekata

get.description: Returns all checkout records in the system, filterable by status. No authorization required.

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: Order Source Device: 1 = Android, 2 = Ios, 3 = Web

200.description: A list of all checkout orders

get.summary: Get complete order details by ID
get.description: Returns full order details including products, totals, user, and source data. Can retrieve both checkouts and pick & collect records.

get.summary: List user's checkouts and pick & collect requests

items.description: Each item can be either a checkout or a pick & collect record

payload.description: Checkout payload. Contains items array with captured product snapshots (name, price, quantity).

post.summary: Create checkout or start card payment flow

type.description: 1 = card payment and returns PayHere hash flow, 2 = cash on delivery and creates normal checkout

payload.description: Checkout payload. Contains items array with captured product snapshots (name, price, quantity).

get.description: Returns the order confirmation bill in HTML format suitable for viewing in a browser.

parameters.name: order_id
parameters.description: The unique Order ID of the checkout

200.description: HTML content of the generated bill invoice

post.summary: Generate PayHere hash and create pending card order

type.description: Optional. Card payments always use type 1.

payload.description: Checkout payload. Contains items array with captured product snapshots (name, price, quantity).

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's notifications newest-first.

platform.description: Device platform code. Use android/ios/web or 1/2/3. Stored as string code: android=1, ios=2, web=3.

put.summary: Create or update my shipping address

get.summary: List my pick and collect requests

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional status filter such as pending or completed
